0.description: Number of branches that got squashed (completely removed) as an earlier branch was mispredicted.

squashes.description: Number of branches that got squashed (completely removed) as an earlier branch was mispredicted.

0.description: Number of branches that got corrected but not yet commited. Branches get corrected by decode or after execute. Also a branch misprediction can be detected out-of-order. Therefore, a corrected branch might not end up beeing committed in case an even earlier branch was mispredicted

corrected.description: Number of branches that got corrected but not yet commited. Branches get corrected by decode or after execute. Also a branch misprediction can be detected out-of-order. Therefore, a corrected branch might not end up beeing committed in case an even earlier branch was mispredicted

0.description: Number of branches that got redirected after decode.

earlyResteers.description: Number of branches that got redirected after decode.

0.description: Number of committed branches that were mispredicted.

mispredicted.description: Number of committed branches that were mispredicted.

0.description: Number of committed branches that were mispredicted by the predictor.

mispredictDueToPredictor.description: Number of committed branches that were mispredicted by the predictor.

0.description: Number of committed branches that were mispredicted because of a BTB miss.

mispredictDueToBTBMiss.description: Number of committed branches that were mispredicted because of a BTB miss.

0.description: The component providing the target for taken branches

targetProvider.description: The component providing the target for taken branches

0.description: Number of branches where the target was incorrect or not available at prediction time.

targetWrong.description: Number of branches where the target was incorrect or not available at prediction time.

condPredictedTaken.description: Number of conditional branches predicted as taken

predTakenBTBMiss.description: Number of branches predicted taken but missed in BTB

BTBMispredicted.description: Number BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong

NoBranch.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

Return.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

CallDirect.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

CallIndirect.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

DirectCond.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

DirectUncond.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

IndirectCond.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

IndirectUncond.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

mispredict.description: Number of BTB mispredictions. No target found or target wrong.

ticksClkGated.description: Distribution of time spent in the clock gated state

UNDEFINED.description: Cumulative time (in ticks) in various power states

ON.description: Cumulative time (in ticks) in various power states

CLK_GATED.description: Cumulative time (in ticks) in various power states

SRAM_RETENTION.description: Cumulative time (in ticks) in various power states

OFF.description: Cumulative time (in ticks) in various power states

pwrStateResidencyTicks.description: Cumulative time (in ticks) in various power states

pushes.description: Number of times a PC was pushed onto the RAS

pops.description: Number of times a PC was poped from the RAS

squashes.description: Number of times the stack operation was squashed due to wrong speculation.

used.description: Number of times the RAS is the provider

correct.description: Number of times the RAS is the provider and the prediction is correct

incorrect.description: Number of times the RAS is the provider and the prediction is wrong

hits.description: Number of hits of a tag

targetRecords.description: Number of targets that where recorded/installed in the cache

indirectRecords.description: Number of indirect branches/calls recorded in the indirect hist

speculativeOverflows.description: Number of times more than the allowed capacity for speculative branches/calls where in flight and destroy the path history
